alert_payload.title: [FIRING:1] OpenClaw MCP integration unreachable
alert_payload.message: OpenClaw MCP tool call failed and the agent cannot retrieve conversation context.
alert_payload.text: Investigate the OpenClaw MCP bridge — `search_openclaw_conversations` is failing against the configured endpoint.

commonAnnotations.summary: OpenClaw MCP integration is unreachable in the local e2e harness
commonAnnotations.description: An OpenClaw MCP tool call (e.g. `search_openclaw_conversations`) raised an error before returning. Likely causes: Gateway not running, MCP bridge not started, wrong endpoint configured, or upstream tool call hung past the configured timeout. See `app.integrations.openclaw.describe_openclaw_error` for the canonical remediation hints.

annotations.summary: OpenClaw MCP integration is unreachable in the local e2e harness
annotations.description: An OpenClaw MCP tool call raised an error before returning. The e2e orchestrator should populate ``failure_mode``, ``transport_mode``, ``command``, ``url``, and ``last_error`` annotations before invoking the investigation pipeline.
